picker.title: Choose your market
picker.subtitle: Pick where you want to learn about money. You can switch anytime.

unlock.title: Unlock all markets with Premium
unlock.body: Free learners explore one market at a time. Go Premium to learn money skills across every country.

comingSoon.title: New lessons for {{market}} are on the way!
comingSoon.body: We're building this market's money lessons. In the meantime, keep learning in {{home}}.
